response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including C++ and SQL, but his recent and relevant experience is primarily in web, mobile, and AI-agent infrastructure using TypeScript, Node.js, and other modern languages. His background lacks recent, direct exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains, and his C++ experience is not centered on Windows platform development in financial systems. His expertise in Stripe and Shopify does not align with the mandatory financial domain requirements.
strengths: Extensive C++ experience, including legacy work at National Instruments
Strong SQL and database management skills across multiple platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex software systems
concerns: No recent or significant experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Lacks focused Windows platform C++ development for financial systems (recent work in Node.js, TypeScript, etc.)
No demonstrated experience with Summit platform or messaging frameworks (Kafka, MQ) relevant to the role
